title: Chore: Ignore .jolli Directory
content:
## Overview

The `.jolli` directory is intentionally excluded from version control in this project. An ignore rule was added to prevent the `.jolli` directory and its contents from being tracked or committed.

## What Was Done

A chore commit (`31d93c3f`) added an ignore entry for the `.jolli` directory. This is a project-level hygiene change with no impact on application behavior or build output.

## Rationale

The `.jolli` directory is likely generated by a local tooling or workflow system (e.g., the Jolli tool or a related process) and contains artifacts that are not relevant to the project's source history. Ignoring it keeps the repository clean and prevents accidental commits of ephemeral or environment-specific files.
